test_cases.input_summary: 1x90 min independent UK documentary, 20 shoot days, domestic travel, archive, original score, motion graphics
test_cases.notes: Comprehensive line-item structure. Rate ranges realistic for UK indie market. Budget notes correctly identified archive and score as key cost risks.

test_cases.input_summary: 4x60 min observational series, US market, 40 shoot days, union crew, broadcaster attached
test_cases.notes: Handled series multiplication well. Union rate acknowledgment present but flagged as needing verification against specific guild minimums. USD currency correctly applied.

test_cases.input_summary: Minimal input: 1x30 min short doc, 5 shoot days, no post details, no region specified
test_cases.notes: Applied reasonable defaults. Flagged missing region as affecting rate accuracy. Post-production section included standard items with a note that requirements should be confirmed.
